Tier List Stands Styles Subs Codes Guides
← All Styles

Boxing

Reliable combos, high burst, close-range specialist. Great for extending M1 chains and maximizing damage output in close quarters. The most popular fighting style.

9/10Combo Potential
8/10Damage Scaling
CloseRange

Moves

B

Jaw Breaker

A powerful uppercut that launches opponents into the air for follow-up combos.

N

Dash Punch

Lunge forward with a fast punch, closing gaps quickly.

M

Eye Gouge

Temporarily blind the opponent, reducing their accuracy.

✅ Pros

  • Highest combo potential in the game
  • Great M1 chain extensions
  • Works with almost every Stand
  • Easy to learn, hard to master

❌ Cons

  • Very short range — requires closing distance
  • Struggles against kiting and zoning playstyles
  • No sustain or defensive options

Best Stands to Pair With

S Whitesnake S The World A Star Platinum A Crazy Diamond S King Crimson A Purple Haze

How to Unlock

Talk to the Boxing Trainer at Bus Stop 3 (Gym). Costs $5,000.
